_description: Streamer disconnected briefly. Cloudflare is still holding the session. videoUID and hlsUrl are the SAME as the preceding 'live' state — the stream hasn't changed.
_server_must: ETag must differ from the preceding 'live' ETag (state changed from live to reconnecting). videoUID and hlsUrl must be identical to the last known live values. Source should be 'webhook' if the reconnecting event came from a webhook.
